data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for bounce handling and re-delivery.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the bounce handling and re-delivery functionality, which is a specific need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this feature. The prior steps focus on booking processes and member management, but none address the bounce handling and re-delivery requirement directly, indicating a gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence of bounce handling and re-delivery functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
